title: Prognostic impact of presentation phenotypes in early-stage favorable Hodgkin lymphoma.
abstract: In early-stage favorable Hodgkin lymphoma (ES-HL), lymph node involvement patterns (NIP) have not been investigated until now. Adding finer granularity to the current disease classification system evaluated through systematically incorporating NIP alongside established clinical variables may help to identify distinct patient subgroups and improve the understanding of ES-HL.
